generic_rules: Place AGREE contracts within `annex agree {** ... **};` blocks.
Component type contracts should use visible component ports and features.
Implementation-level bindings belong in implementation scopes.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Stateful equations require initialized temporal recurrence: `0.0 -> pre(t) + step`.
anti_patterns: Do not use AADL property names (e.g., Compute_Execution_Time) directly as AGREE variables.
Avoid using implementation-only subcomponent paths in component type contracts.
